employeeId.description: A unique identifier for the employee.

firstName.description: The first name of the employee.

lastName.description: The last name of the employee.

email.description: The email address of the employee.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the employee.

position.description: The job position of the employee.

department.description: The department where the employee works.

dateOfHire.description: The date when the employee was hired.

isActive.description: Indicates if the employee is currently active.
